agents.name: Kai — AI Sales Copilot
agents.description: A chat-based AI assistant that gives sales reps instant access to customer data, order history, pricing, and product information. Kai surfaces insights, creates tasks, builds quotes, and takes action — all through natural language.

capabilities.title: Customer Intelligence
capabilities.description: Instant 360° view of any customer — revenue trends, open orders, payment status, assigned rep, and activity history from a single query.

capabilities.title: Task Automation
capabilities.description: Create, update, and manage CRM tasks through conversation. Stage tasks with pre-filled data and confirm with one click.

capabilities.title: Multi-Intent Processing
capabilities.description: Handle complex queries with multiple requests in a single sentence. Kai splits them into parallel branches and streams results progressively.

capabilities.title: Revenue Analytics
capabilities.description: Pull quarterly and monthly revenue data, trend analysis, and comparative metrics for any customer or segment.

capabilities.title: Knowledge Base Search
capabilities.description: Answer product, policy, and process questions by searching your uploaded organizational documents.

capabilities.title: Conversational Follow-ups
capabilities.description: Modify staged actions, swap widget views, and refine outputs through natural language — no re-querying needed.

dataPermissions.name: Customer Data
dataPermissions.description: Access to customer profiles, contact info, tags, and segmentation

dataPermissions.name: Order History
dataPermissions.description: Read access to all orders, quotes, carts, and wishlists

dataPermissions.name: Revenue & Analytics
dataPermissions.description: Access to sales reports, revenue metrics, and trend data

dataPermissions.name: CRM Tasks
dataPermissions.description: Read and write access to tasks, follow-ups, and activity logs

dataPermissions.name: Product Catalog
dataPermissions.description: Access to product data, pricing, inventory levels, and images

dataPermissions.name: Knowledge Base
dataPermissions.description: Access to uploaded organizational documents for Q&A

connectors.description: Customer management, task automation, activity tracking

connectors.description: Sales analytics, revenue metrics, performance dashboards

agents.name: Ella — AI Order Entry Assistant
agents.description: Reads purchase orders from emails, PDFs, spreadsheets, scanned documents, and handwritten notes. Extracts line items, validates against your catalog and ERP, and creates clean, structured orders — automatically.

capabilities.title: Multi-Format PO Reading
capabilities.description: Processes purchase orders from emails, PDFs, Excel files, scanned documents, voice messages, and even handwritten line sheets.

capabilities.title: Intelligent Data Extraction
capabilities.description: Pulls SKUs, descriptions, quantities, pricing, and customer details from any format — even when buyers use their own naming conventions.

capabilities.title: Validation Engine
capabilities.description: Cross-checks every line item against your ERP data, price lists, and real-time inventory. Flags mismatches before they become problems.

capabilities.title: Error Detection
capabilities.description: Identifies missing fields, duplicate entries, incorrect pricing, and inconsistent quantities with clear flagging for human review.

capabilities.title: ERP-Ready Output
capabilities.description: Generates structured sales orders formatted to match your ERP's required fields and defaults. No manual re-keying.

capabilities.title: Confirmation Workflow
capabilities.description: Sends order confirmations to both customer and sales rep once approved by admin. Full audit trail maintained.

dataPermissions.name: Email Access
dataPermissions.description: Read access to designated order processing inboxes

dataPermissions.name: ERP Data
dataPermissions.description: Read/write to ERP system for order creation and validation

dataPermissions.name: Product Catalog
dataPermissions.description: Access to SKUs, pricing, pack sizes for validation

dataPermissions.name: Customer Records
dataPermissions.description: Access to customer accounts for order association

dataPermissions.name: Inventory Levels
dataPermissions.description: Real-time stock data for availability validation

connectors.name: Email Gateway
connectors.description: Gmail, Outlook, or custom SMTP inbox monitoring

connectors.name: ERP System
connectors.description: SAP, NetSuite, QuickBooks, or custom ERP integration

agents.name: Inventory Watchdog
agents.description: Continuously monitors inventory levels across your warehouse and fulfillment network. Alerts on low stock, predicts stockout dates based on velocity, and auto-generates reorder recommendations.

capabilities.title: Real-Time Stock Monitoring
capabilities.description: Tracks inventory levels across all warehouses and fulfillment centers with configurable alert thresholds per SKU.

capabilities.title: Stockout Prediction
capabilities.description: Uses historical sales velocity and seasonality patterns to predict when each SKU will run out — days or weeks in advance.

capabilities.title: Reorder Recommendations
capabilities.description: Auto-generates purchase order suggestions based on lead times, MOQs, and predicted demand.

capabilities.title: Dead Stock Detection
capabilities.description: Identifies slow-moving inventory that hasn't sold in configurable time windows. Suggests markdowns or bundle strategies.

capabilities.title: Customer Impact Alerts
capabilities.description: Flags when low-stock SKUs appear in active customer wishlists, open carts, or pending quotes.

capabilities.title: Supplier Lead Time Tracking
capabilities.description: Monitors supplier performance and adjusts reorder timing based on actual delivery patterns.

dataPermissions.name: Inventory Data
dataPermissions.description: Real-time access to stock levels, warehouse locations, and SKU movements

dataPermissions.name: Order Pipeline
dataPermissions.description: Access to open orders, pending shipments, and inbound POs for demand calculation

dataPermissions.name: Product Catalog
dataPermissions.description: SKU data, pack sizes, MOQs, and supplier information

dataPermissions.name: Supplier Data
dataPermissions.description: Lead times, pricing agreements, and supplier performance history

connectors.name: Warehouse Management
connectors.description: ShipBob, ShipHero, or custom WMS integration

agents.name: Quote Optimizer
agents.description: Analyzes your quote history, win/loss patterns, and competitive landscape to suggest optimal pricing strategies. Auto-generates competitive quotes with customer-specific pricing adjustments.

capabilities.title: Win/Loss Analysis
capabilities.description: Identifies pricing patterns in won vs. lost quotes. Surfaces the pricing sweet spots per customer segment and product category.

capabilities.title: Dynamic Discount Suggestions
capabilities.description: Recommends discount levels based on order size, customer lifetime value, and competitive pressure — without giving away margin.

capabilities.title: Auto-Quote Generation
capabilities.description: Creates draft quotes from customer conversations or order history. Pre-fills products, quantities, and pricing based on buying patterns.

capabilities.title: Expiry Management
capabilities.description: Tracks pending quotes, sends proactive follow-up reminders, and flags quotes approaching expiration.

capabilities.title: Margin Protection
capabilities.description: Sets minimum margin guardrails per product or category. Alerts when a proposed discount would breach thresholds.

capabilities.title: Competitive Price Matching
capabilities.description: Compares your pricing against market benchmarks and adjusts recommendations accordingly.

dataPermissions.name: Quote History
dataPermissions.description: Full access to all quotes — won, lost, pending, expired

dataPermissions.name: Price Lists
dataPermissions.description: Access to all price lists, volume tiers, and customer-specific pricing

dataPermissions.name: Customer Data
dataPermissions.description: Customer segmentation, LTV, and purchase history for pricing optimization

dataPermissions.name: Cost & Margin Data
dataPermissions.description: Product cost, margin targets, and minimum pricing rules

agents.name: Customer Churn Predictor
agents.tagline: Spot at-risk accounts before they leave
agents.description: Monitors buying patterns, engagement signals, and account activity to flag customers at risk of churning. Provides early warning scores and recommended retention actions.

capabilities.title: Churn Risk Scoring
capabilities.description: Assigns a risk score (0-100) to every active account based on order frequency changes, declining order values, and engagement drops.

capabilities.title: Early Warning Signals
capabilities.description: Detects leading indicators: missed reorder cycles, reduced product variety, declining average order value, support ticket spikes.

capabilities.title: Retention Playbooks
capabilities.description: Suggests specific actions per at-risk account: personal outreach, exclusive pricing, product recommendations, or loyalty incentives.

capabilities.title: Win-Back Campaigns
capabilities.description: Identifies lapsed customers with reactivation potential and generates personalized outreach sequences.

capabilities.title: Segment Health Monitoring
capabilities.description: Tracks churn trends by customer segment, region, and product category for strategic planning.

capabilities.title: Revenue Impact Forecasting
capabilities.description: Estimates potential revenue loss from at-risk accounts to help prioritize retention efforts.

dataPermissions.name: Customer Profiles
dataPermissions.description: Account details, segmentation, and lifecycle stage

dataPermissions.name: Order History
dataPermissions.description: Complete order history for pattern analysis

dataPermissions.name: Engagement Data
dataPermissions.description: Login frequency, catalog views, wishlist activity, and support interactions

dataPermissions.name: Support Tickets
dataPermissions.description: Ticket volume and sentiment for risk signal detection

agents.name: Trade Show Prep Assistant
agents.tagline: Walk in prepared, walk out with deals
agents.description: Builds comprehensive pre-show briefs for every attending customer, schedules follow-ups automatically, tracks booth leads in real time, and generates post-show action plans.

capabilities.title: Pre-Show Customer Briefs
capabilities.description: Auto-generates one-page briefs for each attending customer: recent orders, open quotes, wishlist items, suggested upsells, and conversation starters.

capabilities.title: Booth Lead Capture
capabilities.description: Scan badges or enter contact info on-the-fly. Automatically associates leads with your CRM and creates follow-up tasks.

capabilities.title: Real-Time Order Taking
capabilities.description: Build carts and place orders directly from the booth using mobile-optimized workflows during live customer conversations.

capabilities.title: Post-Show Follow-Up Engine
capabilities.description: Generates personalized follow-up sequences for every booth visitor within 24 hours of show close.

capabilities.title: Show ROI Tracking
capabilities.description: Tracks orders, quotes, and revenue attributed to each trade show for clear ROI reporting.

capabilities.title: Schedule Management
capabilities.description: Manages meeting slots, booth shifts, and customer appointments throughout the show.

dataPermissions.name: Customer Data
dataPermissions.description: Customer profiles and order history for brief generation

dataPermissions.name: Product Catalog
dataPermissions.description: Products, pricing, and inventory for on-site ordering

dataPermissions.name: Calendar Access
dataPermissions.description: Meeting schedules and appointment slots

dataPermissions.name: Lead Database
dataPermissions.description: Write access to create and update leads from booth interactions

connectors.name: Badge Scanner
connectors.description: Lead capture from trade show badges

agents.name: Returns & Claims Processor
agents.description: Automates the entire returns and claims lifecycle — from initial request intake and authorization to resolution tracking and pattern analysis across your customer base.

capabilities.title: Automated Return Authorization
capabilities.description: Processes return requests against your policy rules. Auto-approves qualifying returns, flags exceptions for human review.

capabilities.title: Claims Intake
capabilities.description: Accepts claims via email, form, or chat. Extracts product details, damage descriptions, and supporting documentation automatically.

capabilities.title: Resolution Tracking
capabilities.description: Manages each claim through your resolution workflow: received → under review → approved/denied → resolved. Full status visibility.

capabilities.title: Pattern Detection
capabilities.description: Surfaces recurring return reasons by product, SKU, or supplier. Identifies quality issues before they scale.

capabilities.title: Credit & Refund Processing
capabilities.description: Calculates refund amounts, generates credit memos, and syncs with your accounting system.

capabilities.title: Customer Communication
capabilities.description: Sends automated status updates to customers at each stage of the return/claim process.

dataPermissions.name: Order History
dataPermissions.description: Access to original orders for return validation

dataPermissions.name: Returns Database
dataPermissions.description: Read/write to returns and claims records

dataPermissions.name: Return Policies
dataPermissions.description: Business rules for auto-authorization decisions

dataPermissions.name: Accounting Data
dataPermissions.description: Credit memo generation and refund processing

agents.name: Catalog Curator
agents.description: Automatically generates custom product catalogs tailored to each buyer based on their purchase history, preferences, browsing behavior, and seasonal trends.

capabilities.title: Buyer-Specific Curation
capabilities.description: Analyzes each buyer's order history and preferences to create catalogs featuring products they're most likely to purchase.

capabilities.title: Seasonal Recommendations
capabilities.description: Adjusts catalog contents based on seasonal buying patterns, upcoming trade shows, and holiday calendars.

capabilities.title: New Product Spotlights
capabilities.description: Automatically features new arrivals that match each buyer's category preferences and price points.

capabilities.title: Cross-Sell Intelligence
capabilities.description: Identifies complementary products that pair well with each buyer's frequent purchases.

capabilities.title: Digital Catalog Generation
capabilities.description: Creates shareable PDF or web-based catalogs branded with your company's look and feel.

capabilities.title: Performance Tracking
capabilities.description: Tracks which curated products get viewed, added to cart, and ordered — improving recommendations over time.

agents.name: Delivery Tracker
agents.tagline: Real-time shipment visibility for your team
agents.description: Provides real-time delivery tracking across all carriers, proactively notifies reps and customers about delays, and predicts accurate ETAs based on carrier performance patterns.

capabilities.title: Multi-Carrier Tracking
capabilities.description: Unified tracking dashboard across UPS, FedEx, USPS, DHL, and regional carriers. One view for all shipments.

capabilities.title: Proactive Delay Alerts
capabilities.description: Detects potential delays based on carrier scan patterns and weather data. Notifies reps before customers ask.

capabilities.title: ETA Prediction
capabilities.description: Uses historical carrier performance data to provide more accurate delivery estimates than carrier-stated ETAs.

capabilities.title: Customer Notification Engine
capabilities.description: Sends branded shipping updates via email or SMS at each milestone: shipped, in transit, out for delivery, delivered.

capabilities.title: Exception Management
capabilities.description: Flags failed deliveries, address issues, and customs holds. Creates resolution tasks automatically.

capabilities.title: Delivery Analytics
capabilities.description: Carrier performance scorecards, on-time delivery rates, and cost-per-shipment analysis.

dataPermissions.name: Shipment Data
dataPermissions.description: Tracking numbers, carrier info, and shipment status

dataPermissions.name: Order Data
dataPermissions.description: Order details linked to shipments for customer context

dataPermissions.description: Email and phone for delivery notifications

agents.name: Rep Performance Coach
agents.tagline: Data-driven coaching for your sales team
agents.description: Analyzes individual rep performance patterns, suggests account prioritization, generates weekly digests, and identifies coaching opportunities based on selling behaviors.

capabilities.title: Individual Performance Dashboards
capabilities.description: Per-rep metrics: revenue generated, quote conversion rate, average deal size, activity frequency, and pipeline health.

capabilities.title: Account Prioritization
capabilities.description: Recommends which accounts each rep should focus on today based on deal stage, inactivity risk, and revenue potential.

capabilities.title: Weekly Performance Digests
capabilities.description: Auto-generated summaries sent to each rep and their manager: wins, misses, opportunities, and focus areas.

capabilities.title: Selling Pattern Analysis
capabilities.description: Identifies what top performers do differently: contact frequency, product mix, pricing strategies, and follow-up timing.

capabilities.title: Goal Tracking
capabilities.description: Tracks progress against individual and team quotas with real-time projections and pace indicators.

capabilities.title: Coaching Recommendations
capabilities.description: Surfaces specific, actionable coaching suggestions for managers based on observed rep behaviors and outcomes.
